title: T-032 — QA-030 incoming inspection list (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-032 — QA-030 incoming inspection list

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-030, §8.5 prototype incoming_inspection_list
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/inspections/incoming` Server Component listing pending/assigned/in_progress incoming inspections with filter toolbar, urgent overdue strip, and row click → detail.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/quality/inspections/incoming/page.tsx` Server Component reads from v_inspection_backlog (created in T-035) limited to inspection_type='incoming'.
2. Top toolbar: type Select (incoming/scanner_quick/allergen_changeover/all), status, priority, inspector Select, date range.
3. Urgent overdue strip at top showing 'N inspections overdue — expand'.
4. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx:3-97`.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/inspections/incoming/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/InspectionListTable.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/__tests__/incomingList.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx:3-97, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (urgent strip + filter toolbar + 9-col Table in declared order Inspection#/Type/Reference/Product/Priority/Status/Assigned/Scheduled/Action), visuals (shadcn Table/Select/Badge/Alert/Button only), and interaction (urgent strip click expands the table to overdue-only filter, row click → /quality/inspections/incoming/:id) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given v_inspection_backlog returns 0 pending rows, when the page renders, then the empty-state copy 'No pending inspections.' is shown and the urgent strip is hidden
3. Given 3 overdue inspections exist, when the page loads, then the urgent strip shows '3 inspections overdue — expand' and clicking it filters the table to urgency=overdue

pipeline_inputs.description: Incoming inspection list with filter toolbar + urgent overdue strip + 9-col Table; parity with incoming_inspection_list prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component reads v_inspection_backlog filtered to incoming. Filter toolbar via shadcn Select. Urgent strip uses shadcn Alert variant=destructive. Rows route to detail page.
out_of_scope: Do not implement other inspection types (P2 in_process/final)
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx:3-97, then it has parity on structure (urgent strip + filter toolbar + 9-col Table in declared order), visuals (shadcn primitives only), and interaction (urgent strip click filters to overdue, row click → /quality/inspections/incoming/:id) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given v_inspection_backlog returns 0 pending rows, when the page renders, then empty-state copy 'No pending inspections.' is shown and the urgent strip is hidden
Given 3 overdue rows exist, when the page loads, then the urgent strip shows '3 inspections overdue — expand' and clicking it filters the table to urgency=overdue
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/__tests__/incomingList.test.tsx asserting structure, empty/overdue states, filter persistence
risk_red_lines: Do not use native HTML <select> per translation notes
Do not lose URL filter state on navigation
